title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Japanese Derby has finally
arrived, and Matikanefukukitaru burns with
eagerness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Always in her element to ward off evil spirits,
Matikanefukukitaru is confident that this monster
of a Derby will not overwhelm her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads to the track determined to push herself
to her limits.
